title: Post Modernism in Eva
wikitext:
[]: Post-Modernism in Eva             Quote Post by o_resentfull_one » Thu Mar 03, 2005 7:24 am ok, this is a strange little thought that made me think a few days ago. post moderism is the idea that nothing is real unless proved to that person. my thoughts on NGE have always been that nothing in it is truly proved, nothing is stated out and full most. and those things that are stated are often proved wrong. this is basically why annos quote of NGE being "what you make it" works, because for postmoderism to be realm you have to prove the fact to yourself, and any idea in eva has to be accepted and 'proved' to that person. that is why it is what we make it. because of the postmoderism stuff. random thoughts huh? can you tell i was bored?

[]: Re: Post-Modernism in Eva             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Mar 03, 2005 1:04 pm I've invoked the spirit of post-modernism when trying to contrast the text, which is what we all have and share, and all the various trickles of "might have been" information from abandoned alternatives.

Article: Post Modernism in Eva
[]: Post-Modernism in Eva             Quote Post by o_resentfull_one » Thu Mar 03, 2005 7:24 am ok, this is a strange little thought that made me think a few days ago. post moderism is the idea that nothing is real unless proved to that person. my thoughts on NGE have always been that nothing in it is truly proved, nothing is stated out and full most. and those things that are stated are often proved wrong. this is basically why annos quote of NGE being "what you make it" works, because for postmoderism to be realm you have to prove the fact to yourself, and any idea in eva has to be accepted and 'proved' to that person. that is why it is what we make it. because of the postmoderism stuff. random thoughts huh? can you tell i was bored?

[]: Re: Post-Modernism in Eva             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Mar 03, 2005 1:04 pm I've invoked the spirit of post-modernism when trying to contrast the text, which is what we all have and share, and all the various trickles of "might have been" information from abandoned alternatives.
